title: selaginella mannii
intro: Selaginella mannii, also known as Spiked resurrection fern, is a species of evergreen, terrestrial plant that belongs to the family Selaginellaceae. It has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin infections. The plant's leaves and stems have been used in herbal preparations, such as teas and tinctures, to provide health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving respiratory issues, and promoting wound healing. Additionally, the plant is also used to treat digestive issues and as an antiseptic to prevent the spread of infections.
